title: Aureline work-item provider-reconciliation outcome vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the provider_reconciliation_record frozen in docs/work_items/offline_draft_and_reconciliation_contract.md. One record family freezes the typed outcome the apply path mints when an offline_draft_packet_record drains against the provider (or fails to drain because the provider state has drifted, the remote object has been superseded, the connected account has been revoked, the bound account-mapping has remapped, the freshness floor has been raised, the policy epoch has rolled, or the workspace trust has been downgraded). The packet pins the bound offline_draft_packet_record, the bound work_item_detail_record, the typed reconciliation_outcome_class (clean publish admissible / conflict observed local vs provider / superseded by remote state / missing authority no apply / account mismatch no apply / archived local-only no provider path / re-review required after expiry / re-review required on freshness drift / re-review required on account remap / re-review required on policy epoch roll), the typed missing_authority_class (when applicable), the per-field conflict_field_rows (when applicable), the typed next_safe_action_class so a downstream surface knows whether to offer try-again / re-review / archive / open-account-mapping, and the lineage refs back to the bound publish_later_queue_item / browser_handoff_packet / offline_handoff_packet / account_mapping_binding / provider_callback_envelope / superseded predecessor. The packet never silently advances; clean_publish_admissible is admissible only when the apply path observed a fresh provider_callback_envelope_record AND the bound offline_draft_packet_record's expiry has not elapsed. Composes with the offline_draft_packet_record schema (the bound draft the reconciliation resolves), the work_item_detail_record schema, the provider_object_record schema (re-exports provider_field_class on conflict-field rows), the change_intent_record schema (the rationale the draft was authored under), the publish-later contract (publish_later_queue_item_record, provider_consequence_preview_record, account_mapping_binding_record, provider_callback_envelope_record, browser_handoff_packet_record), and the offline_handoff_packet_record schema (the bound captured-under-unavailability packet). Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw label values that disclose customer / tenant identity, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, raw notification payloads, and raw automation payloads never cross this boundary regardless of redaction class. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record_kind, reconciliation_outcome_class, missing_authority_class, conflict_origin_class, next_safe_action_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps provider_reconciliation_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

provider_reconciliation_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the provider-reconciliation vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / queue-review rollups / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, raw notification payloads, and raw automation payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for support / audit / queue-review / admin-reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, queue-review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state the reconciliation was attempted under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw payloads never cross this boundary regardless of class.

provider_field_class.description: Provider-field class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/provider_object.schema.json so a conflict-field row cites the same vocabulary the projection schema uses.

conflict_origin_class.description: Conflict-origin class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/offline_draft_packet.schema.json. Pins the typed drift the reconciliation observed; no_conflict_observed is admissible only on a clean publish.

reconciliation_outcome_class.description: Frozen reconciliation-outcome class. Names the typed truth the apply path mints when an offline_draft_packet_record drains. clean_publish_admissible is the only outcome that admits a provider mutation; every other outcome blocks the apply path and pins the typed next-safe-action so the user sees 'safe to publish later' vs 'must re-review' vs 'must reselect account' vs 'must archive locally' truth instead of generic 'pending' messaging.

missing_authority_class.description: Frozen missing-authority class. Required outside no_missing_authority when reconciliation_outcome_class is missing_authority_no_apply; no_missing_authority is admissible (and required) for every other outcome.

next_safe_action_class.description: Frozen next-safe-action class. Pins the typed action the surface offers next so the user sees 'safe to publish later' vs 'must re-review' vs 'must reselect account' vs 'must archive locally' truth instead of generic 'something failed'.

local_draft_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the local draft's value for this field at draft authoring time.

provider_remote_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the provider's current remote value for this field as observed at reconciliation time.

remote_observed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the remote value was observed at reconciliation time. Empty when the conflict was observed without a fresh provider read (e.g. policy-epoch roll observed locally).

allOf.description: no_conflict_observed conflict-origin is forbidden in conflict_field_rows; that origin is admissible only on the reconciliation_outcome_class = clean_publish_admissible packet whose conflict_field_rows is empty.

conflict_field_row.description: One row in the reconciliation packet's conflict_field_rows list. Each row pins the typed provider field, the typed conflict origin, the local-draft and provider-remote labels, and the observed-at timestamp so a downstream conflict-resolution surface can render typed conflict truth without re-fetching the provider object.

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin the reconciliation was attempted under. Reused identically by the offline_draft_packet / work_item_detail / status_transition_packet / change_intent / external_publish_preview schemas.

policy_context.description: Policy context the reconciliation was attempted under.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary. clean_publish_must_not_outlive_offline_draft_packet_expires_at is the gate that forbids a reconciliation from minting clean_publish_admissible against an offline_draft_packet whose expires_at has elapsed; clean_publish_must_cite_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_ref forbids a clean publish without a fresh provider-callback observation.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event vocabulary for the provider-reconciliation lifecycle.

offline_draft_packet_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_draft_packet_record the reconciliation resolves. The packet never floats free of a draft.

work_item_detail_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound work_item_detail_record the reconciliation runs against.

linked_change_intent_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound change_intent_record so the rationale, target scope, linked review, approvals stay visible across the reconciliation.

linked_status_transition_packet_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound status_transition_packet_record. Empty admissible only when the draft was a comment-only or rename-only draft with no structured transition packet.

linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound publish_later_queue_item_record the reconciliation drained. Required when reconciliation_outcome_class is clean_publish_admissible AND the bound offline_draft_packet was admitted via queue_for_publish_later_within_expiry.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound browser_handoff_packet_record the reconciliation routed through. Required when next_safe_action_class is open_in_provider_via_browser_handoff OR retry_publish_via_browser_handoff.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_handoff_packet_record the reconciliation drained. Empty admissible when the draft was authored online without an offline-handoff packet.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound account_mapping_binding_record. Required when reconciliation_outcome_class is account_mismatch_no_apply OR re_review_required_account_remap.

linked_provider_callback_envelope_record.description: Opaque refs to provider_callback_envelope_records that confirmed (or rejected) provider acceptance. Required non-empty when reconciliation_outcome_class is clean_publish_admissible OR conflict_observed_local_vs_provider OR superseded_by_remote_state (the conflict / supersession was observed via a provider read).

linked_provider_consequence_preview_reco.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider_consequence_preview_record the user confirmed against at draft authoring time. Empty when the draft was an inspect_only_what_if or archive_local_only_no_provider_path strategy.

supersedes_provider_reconciliation_recor.description: Opaque ref to a prior provider_reconciliation_record this one supersedes (e.g. after a freshness refresh or an account remap retry). Empty for a fresh reconciliation.

superseded_by_provider_reconciliation_re.description: Opaque ref to the provider_reconciliation_record that superseded this one.

conflict_field_rows.description: Ordered conflict-field rows. Empty array is admissible only when reconciliation_outcome_class is clean_publish_admissible / archived_local_only_no_provider_path / missing_authority_no_apply / account_mismatch_no_apply / re_review_required_expired_intent / re_review_required_workspace_trust_downgrade and conflict_origin_class is no_conflict_observed.

remote_revision_label_after.description: Reviewable label of the provider object's revision observed at reconciliation time. Required non-empty when reconciliation_outcome_class is superseded_by_remote_state.

block_reason_summary.description: Optional reviewable summary of the blocking reason. Required when reconciliation_outcome_class is one of conflict_observed_local_vs_provider / superseded_by_remote_state / missing_authority_no_apply / account_mismatch_no_apply / re_review_required_*; empty for clean_publish_admissible / archived_local_only_no_provider_path.

allOf.description: clean_publish_admissible MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_refs AND resolve missing_authority_class to no_missing_authority AND resolve conflict_origin_class to no_conflict_observed AND resolve next_safe_action_class to no_action_already_published_clean.

conflict_observed_local_vs_provider MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_refs AND resolve conflict_origin_class outside no_conflict_observed AND carry at least one conflict_field_row AND resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_then_retry / withdraw_offline_draft_packet / archive_local_only_no_provider_path.

superseded_by_remote_state MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_refs AND a non-empty remote_revision_label_after AND resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_then_retry / withdraw_offline_draft_packet.
missing_authority_no_apply MUST resolve missing_authority_class outside no_missing_authority AND resolve next_safe_action_class to a typed wait/request/handoff lane.

account_mismatch_no_apply MUST cite a non-empty linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref AND resolve next_safe_action_class to reselect_connected_account / resolve_account_mapping_binding / withdraw_offline_draft_packet.

archived_local_only_no_provider_path MUST resolve missing_authority_class to no_missing_authority AND resolve conflict_origin_class to no_conflict_observed AND resolve next_safe_action_class to archive_local_only_no_provider_path AND forbid linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref / linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref / linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_refs.
re_review_required_expired_intent MUST resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_after_expiry AND cite a non-empty block_reason_summary.
re_review_required_freshness_drift MUST resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_on_freshness_drift.
re_review_required_account_remap MUST cite a non-empty linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref AND resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_on_account_remap.
re_review_required_policy_epoch_rolled MUST resolve next_safe_action_class to re_review_required_on_policy_epoch_roll.
Every outcome outside missing_authority_no_apply MUST resolve missing_authority_class to no_missing_authority.

provider_reconciliation_record.description: Frozen provider-reconciliation outcome packet for one drain attempt against an offline_draft_packet_record. The packet pins the typed outcome (clean publish / conflict / superseded / missing authority / account mismatch / archived / re-review required), the typed missing-authority class (when applicable), the per-field conflict rows (when applicable), and the typed next-safe-action so a downstream queue-review / support-export / admin-reconciliation surface can render mechanically what the user must do next. clean_publish_admissible is admissible only when the apply path observed a fresh provider_callback_envelope_record AND the bound offline_draft_packet's expires_at has not elapsed.

provider_reconciliation_audit_event_reco.description: Audit-event row for the provider-reconciliation lifecycle. Denial events MUST cite a typed reason from the closed denial vocabulary.
